Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(300 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), C AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2000 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(3000 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS total, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ((SELECT *, 'A' AS t FROM (SELECT * FROM A)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT *, 'B' AS t FROM (SELECT * FROM B)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT *, 'C' AS t FROM (SELECT * FROM C))) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 1,"x", 2,"y", 3,"z" ]; L | where k > 1 | join kind=inner (R | where k < 3) on k | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'y'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'z')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT L.*, R.* RENAME (k AS k1) FROM (SELECT * FROM L WHERE k > 1) AS L INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM R WHERE k < 3) AS R ON L.k = R.k ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST
